name: repo-ingestion-panel-review
description: Specialized workflow for reviewing external repo ingestion: pre-assessment, content review, and integration plan validation through expert panels.

repo_url.description: URL of the repo that was ingested/analyzed

research_output.description: Path to the research output / integration plan document

ingestion_verdict.description: Complete ingestion review with accuracy audit, integration assessment, and feasibility

inputs.instruction: Convene the Repo Ingestion Panel. Run SOLO reviews from all 5 experts (Kim, Petrov, Obi, Larsson, Tanaka). Focus on: accuracy of claims vs actual repo state, integration compatibility, documentation quality, supply chain risks, content consistency. Produce convergence report.

Convene the Architecture & Planning Panel. Review the integration plan for: phase sequencing, dependency correctness, effort realism, value alignment, risk assessment. Incorporate content accuracy findings from the prior panel. Produce convergence report.

Convene the Security Audit Panel. Review the proposed integration for: supply chain risks from imported code/skills, security model compatibility, new attack surfaces introduced by integration, trust boundary changes. Produce convergence report.
Synthesize findings from all three panels. Identify cross-panel agreements (highest confidence), conflicts (needs resolution), and coverage gaps. Produce unified priority stack-rank.

Convene the Feasibility Panel. Evaluate all top recommendations. For plan modifications: assess resequencing effort. For rejected items: confirm rejection is justified. For new recommendations: assess effort, ROI, and minimum viable scope. Produce final feasibility verdicts.
